ComponentDescription: DETR INT8 ONNX inference node — runs inside arm64 Docker container

Run.Script:
docker run --rm \
  --name robops-inference \
  --network host \
  -e MODEL_PATH={artifacts:path}/model_int8.onnx \
  -v {artifacts:path}:{artifacts:path} \
  -e SHADOW_MODE=false \
  -e CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD=0.5 \
  -e ROBOT_ID={configuration:/robotId} \
  -e MONGO_URI={secrets:robops/mongo_uri} \
  688567275774.dkr.ecr.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/robops/inference:PLACEHOLDER_DATASET_VERSION
